headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Trane Technologies (TT) After Its Strong Share Price Run?
summary: Wondering if Trane Technologies at around US$460 a share still offers value, or if the best entry point is already behind you. The stock recently closed at US$460.11, with returns of 7.7% over 7 days, 6.1% over 30 days, 15.6% year to date and 37.3% over 1 year. The 3 year and 5 year returns stand at 170.7% and 187.8%. These share price moves have kept Trane Technologies on many investors' watchlists, as the company sits at the intersection of building solutions, climate control and energy...
